context_for_next_testing_agent: Three AI analysis fixes verified: (1) Image preprocessing works - resizes to max 1280px, converts to JPEG. (2) Clean error messages - frontend displays 'Analyse automatique impossible - Image non reconnue ou format incompatible' instead of raw INVALID_ARGUMENT. (3) Retry endpoint POST /api/damage-reports/{report_id}/retry works and re-runs AI analysis. Key test-ids: retry-analysis-{report_id}, load-photo-{report_id}, damage-report-{report_id}.
